- 2026-06-20: Fix markdown titles for Quarto sidebar
- 2026-06-20: 第三回を追加
- 2026-06-20: Fix URL encoding issues, update math method, and revise intro
- 2026-06-20: Fix markdown headings rendering issue by adding blank lines before headers
- 2026-06-20: Update index.qmd and intro.md
- 2026-06-20: Update layout grid and margins for better width, add git history to margin
- 2026-06-20: Organize directory structure, move scripts and generated files
- 2026-06-20: Update Quarto site configuration, navigation, and logos
- 2026-06-20: Update pre_render.py to support nested directories
- 2026-06-20: Initial commit for Quarto portal site
